narrative:
Precinct Edgerton (precinct in Williams County) has 1,259 registered voters, with 58.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.2 percentage points.
